TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: izua aya ti Quzang kati Tjingangaḍuy.
S.PHON: izua aja ti quzaŋ kati ciŋaŋaɖuj.
S.FORM: izua aya ti Quzang kati Tjingangadruy.
S.PHON: izua aja ti quzaŋ kati ʦiŋaŋaɖuj.
S.TRANSL: They say there was Shrimp and Tree-lizard.

S.FORM: "pai karivui," aya ti Tjingangaḍuy.
S.PHON: "pai karivui," aja ti ciŋaŋaɖuj.
S.FORM: "pai karivui," aya ti Tjingangadruy.
S.PHON: "pai karivui," aja ti ʦiŋaŋaɖuj.

S.FORM: "ui, pumaya," aya ti Quzang.
S.PHON: "ui, pumaja," aja ti quzaŋ.
S.FORM: "ui, pumaya," aya ti Quzang.
S.PHON: "ui, pumaja," aja ti quzaŋ.

S.FORM: saka "keɫu sema kuvuɫ," aya ti Tjingangaḍuy.
S.PHON: saka "kəʎu səma kuvuʎ," aja ti ciŋaŋaɖuj.
S.FORM: saka "kelju sema kuvulj," aya ti Tjingangadruy.
S.PHON: saka "kəʎu səma kuvuʎ," aja ti ʦiŋaŋaɖuj.

S.FORM: mangtjez ti Quzang, saka ɫemama ta kuvuɫ ti Tjingangaḍuy; saka matsay a quzang penuɫat.
S.PHON: maŋcəz ti quzaŋ, saka ʎəmama ta kuvuʎ ti ciŋaŋaɖuj; saka maʦaj a quzaŋ pənuʎat.
S.FORM: mangtjez ti Quzang, saka ljemama ta kuvulj ti Tjingangadruy; saka macay a quzang penuljat.
S.PHON: maŋʦəz ti quzaŋ, saka ʎəmama ta kuvuʎ ti ʦiŋaŋaɖuj; saka maʦaj a quzaŋ pənuʎat.
S.TRANSL: Shrimp came, and Tree-lizard set fire to the meadow; and all the shrimps died.

S.FORM: itanga a tjeza maɫama a quzang.
S.PHON: itaŋa a cəza maʎama a quzaŋ.
S.FORM: itanga a tjeza maljama a quzang.
S.PHON: itaŋa a ʦəza maʎama a quzaŋ.
S.TRANSL: There was only one shrimp left that wasn’t burnt.

S.FORM: saka limutseng a quzang, sa venɫeng ta pana.
S.PHON: saka ɭimuʦəŋ a quzaŋ, sa vənʎəŋ ta pana.
S.FORM: saka limuceng a quzang, sa venljeng ta pana.
S.PHON: saka ɭimuʦəŋ a quzaŋ, sa vənʎəŋ ta pana.
S.TRANSL: The shrimp was angry, and dammed the river.

S.FORM: saka "keɫu," aya ti Quzang.
S.PHON: saka "kəʎu," aja ti quzaŋ.
S.FORM: saka "kelju," aya ti Quzang.
S.PHON: saka "kəʎu," aja ti quzaŋ.

S.FORM: saka mangtjez ti Tjingangaḍuy i pana.
S.PHON: saka maŋcəz ti ciŋaŋaɖuj i pana.
S.FORM: saka mangtjez ti Tjingangadruy i pana.
S.PHON: saka maŋʦəz ti ʦiŋaŋaɖuj i pana.
S.TRANSL: And Tree-lizard came to the river.

S.FORM: saka semuveɫeng anga a quzang ta pana.
S.PHON: saka səmuvəʎəŋ aŋa a quzaŋ ta pana.
S.FORM: saka semuveljeng anga a quzang ta pana.
S.PHON: saka səmuvəʎəŋ aŋa a quzaŋ ta pana.
S.TRANSL: The shrimp removed the dam from the river;

S.FORM: sa qaɫudjan a tjingangaḍuy na zaɫum penuɫat.
S.PHON: sa qaʎuɉan a ciŋaŋaɖuj na zaʎum pənuʎat.
S.FORM: sa qaljudjan a tjingangadruy na zaljum penuljat.
S.PHON: sa qaʎuɉan a ʦiŋaŋaɖuj na zaʎum pənuʎat.
S.TRANSL: and all the tree-lizards were washed away by the water.

S.FORM: itanga a tjeza.
S.PHON: itaŋa a cəza.
S.FORM: itanga a tjeza.
S.PHON: itaŋa a ʦəza.
